opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I just ran out of my PrEP pills, I'm heading out to a major event in two hours, and I absolutely cannot risk catching HIV tonight.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I take a daily HIV-prevention tablet and I've completely run out. I've got a big event on tonight and I want to make sure I'm covered before I go — I need to sort out a refill urgently.

symptom_narrative.onset: realised this afternoon that I'd taken my last pill and the pack is empty
symptom_narrative.duration: no doses left as of today
symptom_narrative.character: I feel completely fine in myself — this is about not having any tablets, not about feeling unwell
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: physically I feel normal, but I'm really stressed about being unprotected tonight
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: not applicable — I don't have any symptoms
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: I've taken it every single day without missing until now
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing to make better — I just need more tablets
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: the event is in about two hours and I've got nothing left
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no fever, no aches, no rash, no swollen glands — I feel well
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never run out before; I've always refilled on time
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: fully well and active; the only problem is the missing medication and the time pressure

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I take PrEP to prevent HIV because I'm at higher risk from my sexual activity
past_medical_history.how_managed: one tablet every day, prescribed by my regular GP / sexual health clinic

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: PrEP — the tenofovir/emtricitabine tablet (I think it's the Truvada-type one), 300/200

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: attending a multi-day event tonight where there will be sexual activity, including condomless receptive anal sex; on PrEP specifically to reduce HIV risk from this

objective_data_offered.value: on camera he looks well and speaks in full sentences; no visible rash on his face or arms, no obvious swelling of the face or neck
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: video only — a clinician cannot examine for lymphadenopathy, a full skin survey or subtle signs over a chat/video link

objective_data_offered.value: held an empty PrEP blister pack up to the camera
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: an empty pack held to a camera cannot be independently verified as the patient's current prescription

objective_data_offered.value: about 78 kg (from my scales at home)
